Reception check-in Residence-style stay St Julian's
Arrival
Check-in
Check-in time

From 4:00 PM
Check-in is handled directly at Mercury Tower Reception.

Early arrival?

Please go directly to Mercury Tower Reception. They manage apartment preparation, can store your bags, and can advise what time to return.

Reception is open 24/7.

No need to contact us for early luggage drop-off — please speak directly with reception staff on arrival.

Check-in is from Mercury Tower Reception
Follow the arrow to Mercury Tower Reception
1
Go to Mercury Tower Reception
Check-in is handled at Mercury Tower Reception. Please go directly to the reception desk on arrival.
2
Collect your keycards and pool cards
Reception will provide the cards needed for your stay. Please keep all cards safe, as lost cards are charged separately.
3
Ask reception for the apartment access instructions
Reception manages the arrival process and will guide you to the apartment.
Departure
Check-out
By 10:00 AM

Please leave the apartment by 10:00 AM on your departure day.

Return all keycards and pool cards to Mercury Tower Reception before leaving.

Before check-in or after check-out
Luggage Storage

You may leave your luggage at Mercury Tower Reception before check-in or after check-out.

Mercury Tower Reception

Please speak directly with reception staff for availability and instructions.

Reception is open 24/7.

Please note
House Rules
  • 🚭
    No smoking indoors — €250 fee applies
    Smoking is only permitted on balconies or outdoor areas. Please close windows and doors when smoking outside.
  • 🌿
    Help us keep it green
    Switch off lights and air conditioning when you head out — even for a short while.
  • 🤫
    Noise & neighbours
    Please keep noise low between 11:00 PM and 8:00 AM.
  • 🎉
    No parties or events — €250 fee applies
    Parties and events of any kind are not permitted in the apartment or building.
  • 🗑️
    Waste collection
    Please take garbage bags out only during the designated collection windows: morning take-out 08:00–08:30, evening take-out 18:00–18:30. Do not leave garbage in corridors or outside the apartment.
  • 🔑
    Keycards & pool cards
    Keep your cards with you during your stay and return all keycards and pool cards to Mercury Tower Reception at check-out. A €50 fee applies for each lost keycard or pool card.
  • 🧺
    Towels — fee based on damage
    Please do not heavily stain towels. Replacement costs will apply if towels are damaged beyond normal use.
  • 🐾
    No pets
    Pets are not permitted. This is a building regulation that applies to all residents and guests.
Before you settle in
Good to Know
Private apartment
This is a private apartment, not a hotel. Daily cleaning is not included.
Reception
Mercury Tower Reception is open 24/7 for check-in, card return and luggage storage.
Additional cleaning
Extra cleaning may be requested separately, subject to availability and extra charges.
Cards
A €50 fee applies for each lost keycard or pool card.
Guest access
✨
2 pool cards included
Extra guests may be subject to additional charges.
🏊‍♀️
Rooftop infinity pool
Panoramic views over Malta. Not heated. Open from 1 June to October depending on weather conditions. Pool access must be booked in advance through Anima Reception.
🏊‍♂️
Outdoor 11th Floor Twist Pool
Not heated. Open all year.
🧖
Spa pool
Free access from 8:00 AM to 12:00 PM.
🏋️
ME Hotel Gym
Free access for guests.
👮
24/7 security
Security is available in the building at all times.

Our picks
Eat & Drink

A few places we enjoy — a good starting point for your stay.

☕ Breakfast & Coffee
Caffè Cordina
Valletta institution
Historic café on Republic Street — beautiful interior, good coffee, classic pastries.
Map →
Lot Sixty One
Specialty coffee
One of Valletta's best specialty coffee spots — carefully sourced beans, relaxed atmosphere.
Map →
🥙 Quick Lunch
Is-Suq tal-Belt
Food Market · Casual
Valletta's covered food market — multiple vendors, from street food to fresh produce.
Map →
Dal Pani
Focacce italiane
Fresh Italian focacce made to order — simple, generous, and full of flavour.
Map →
🍕 Casual / Pizza
Sotto Pinsa Romana
Pizza · Lunch or dinner
Roman-style pinsa with a lighter base. Works for both lunch and a casual evening meal.
Map →
Zero Sei
Best carbonara on the island
Authentic Roman trattoria — unpretentious and reliable. Come for the carbonara.
Map →
🍷 Dinner
One80
Dinner · Reserve ahead
Our pick for a considered evening out in Valletta. Worth booking in advance.
Map →
The Rooftop
Dinner · Panoramic views
Rooftop dining with sweeping views over Valletta. A memorable setting.
Map →
Cockney's
Pub · Est. 1932
One of Valletta's most iconic spots — a classic pub with a long history, hearty food, and a lively atmosphere. Great for a casual drink or bite.
Map →
Mobility
Getting Around
🚶
On foot
Valletta is compact. Most sights and restaurants are within easy walking distance.
⛴️
Ferry
The Valletta Ferry Terminal connects to Sliema and Birgu — scenic and practical.
🚌
Bus
The bus terminal near Triton Fountain serves routes across the whole island.
🚗
Bolt
Bolt operates in Malta — reliable especially at night or for longer distances.
✈️
Airport Transfer
We can arrange a private airport transfer on request. Just ask us in advance.
Worth your time
Must-See Nearby
Map →
Valletta Historic Centre
A UNESCO World Heritage city. Walk the main streets, find the side alleys.
 Map →
Upper Barrakka Gardens
Malta's most iconic viewpoint — sweeping views over the Grand Harbour. Stunning at sunset.
 Map →
St John's Co-Cathedral
One of the most ornate Baroque interiors in Europe and home to Caravaggio's largest painting.
 Map →
Fort St Elmo
A 16th-century fortress at the tip of Valletta, now home to the National War Museum.
 Map →
Lascaris War Rooms
The WWII underground operations centre carved into the bastions.
 Map →
Mdina — The Silent City
Malta's ancient walled capital — narrow stone streets and grand palazzos. Best visited early morning.
 Map →
The Three Cities
Birgu, Senglea, and Bormla — historic fortified towns across the harbour.
Sea & Sun
Beaches
🏖️
Golden Bay
~25–30 min by car
🌊
St Peter's Pool
~25–30 min by car
🏝️
Mellieħa Bay
~40–45 min by car
Further afield
Day Trips
⛵ Gozo
Ferry from Ċirkewwa · ~1 hr from Valletta
Malta's sister island — slower, greener, worth a full day.
🐟 Comino & Blue Lagoon
Organised boat trip
Malta's most iconic swimming spot. Arrive early in summer.
🚤 Coastal Boat Tour
Organised day trip
See Malta from the water — caves, coves, and coastline you can't reach on foot.
